content.text:
**Over-budget categories from budget_q3.csv:**

| Category   | Budgeted | Spent  | Over by |
|------------|----------|--------|---------|
| Marketing  | $30,000  | $31,200 | **$1,200** |

Only the **Marketing** category is over budget (by $1,200). All other categories are on track or under budget.
